elements.name: variable_panel
elements.title: Panel to hold variables for foorm. HIDE AFTER TESTING

elements.name: intro
elements.html:
Teaching {module} Self-paced Online Professional Learning

Post-Module Survey

Code.org relies on surveys as a crucial tool to stay connected to teachers, gather feedback about our curriculum and your teaching experience, and to improve our programs.

Privacy and Confidentiality

  • Your individual responses here are completely confidential.
  • Your identity will never be revealed publicly or used to tie any responses back to you personally.
  • We may share anonymous, aggregate data (representing all responses) publicly.
  • Your anonymized responses will be used by Code.org for program improvement.

Your honesty and candor are appreciated.

Teaching {module}: Post-Module Survey

elements.name: section1_goals
elements.html: The questions in this section aim to understand your experience with the Teaching {module} self-paced professional learning module.

elements.name: comfort_supporting_students_learn_aif_programming
elements.title: After completing this module, I am more comfortable in my ability to support students in designing, analyzing, and debugging programs, including the ethical use of AI tools in their development.

elements.name: comfort_supporting_students_learn_aif_systems
elements.visibleIf: {module} = 'AI and the Systems that Power It'
elements.title: After completing this module, I am more comfortable in my ability to support students in understanding computational systems, applying human-centered design, and critically evaluating the societal and ethical implications of AI and emerging technologies.

elements.name: comfort_supporting_students_learn_aif_internet
elements.title: After completing this module, I am more comfortable in my ability to support students in understanding Internet communication, analyzing network security challenges, and evaluating the ethical use of AI in network security.

elements.name: comfort_supporting_students_learn_aif_cybersecurity
elements.title: After completing this module, I am more comfortable in my ability to support students in critically assessing computing's impact, understanding data privacy and security threats, and advocating for responsible technological advancements.

elements.name: comfort_supporting_students_learn_aif_data
elements.title: After completing this module, I am more comfortable in my ability to support students in understanding data science foundations, analyzing datasets, and telling ethical data stories.

elements.name: comfort_supporting_students_learn_aif_problem_solving
elements.title: After completing this module, I am more comfortable in my ability to support students in understanding, critically evaluating, and responsibly utilizing AI.

elements.name: know_what_students_learn_module
elements.natalia_comment: INCLUDE ONLY if module is about one UNIT (instead of one complete curriculum, if so use know_what_students_learn instead)

elements.name: plan_ongoing_assessment
elements.natalia_comment: INCLUDE ONLY if applicable per curriculum content

elements.name: familiar_student_programming_environments
elements.title: After completing this module, I am more familiar with the programming environments and learning tools that students will use in the {module} curriculum.

elements.name: plan_to_teach
elements.natalia_comment: INCLUDE ONLY IF MODULE IS ABOUT CS CURRICULUM

elements.name: barriers_implementation_ai
elements.natalia_comment: INCLUDE ONLY IF MODULE IS ABOUT AI

elements.name: barriers_implementation_teaching_cs
elements.natalia_comment: INCLUDE ONLY IF MODULE IS ABOUT CS CURRICULUM
